_comment: Shipped preset for Flux Canny ControlNet image edit. Reuses the upstream image as a Canny edge map: source image's structure (edges) is preserved while the main_prompt repaints the content. Read ONCE on first DB row creation.
label: Flux Canny Edit
description: Image edit guided by the upstream image's Canny edges. The Canny node extracts edges → InstructPixToPixConditioning uses them + the prompt to repaint a structurally-similar image. Tweak Canny low/high thresholds (0.15/0.30 default) on the Canny node widget if edge detection is too noisy / too sparse.

image.error: Flux Canny needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.

text.default: A vibrant red ladybug rests on a blooming deep purple rose with lush, velvety petals.
